body:
A first pass at a snow model, based on the design doc linked in the corresponding issue and here https://www.overleaf.com/7694514265pntbczwbhmmb 
SLIM code melting term: https://github.com/marysa/SimpleLand/blob/6e986f9ca7d7183c28b501267721828c3b7110b2/src/main/mml_main.F90#L1064

We set the snow cover fraction to a heaviside function, so we only compute one set of surface fluxes each step. Otherwise we have implemented the equations in the doc as noted.

These conserve energy and water but have not been tested beyond that.

The melt term formulation can be changed as we wish in the future or now.
title: start adding snow
